---
title: "Publications"
---

::: {.lead-block}
Mace C, O'Sullivan F, **Wilson SR**. Reductionism in engram neuroscience.
*European Journal of Neuroscience* (2026).
[doi:10.1111/ejn.70497](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1111/ejn.70497)
[co-first]{.muted}
:::

::: {.lead-block}
Ferreira Castro A, **Wilson S**, Cardona A. Evaluating traces of Hebbian plasticity
in the *Drosophila* antennal lobe. *PNAS* **120** (2023).
[doi:10.1073/pnas.2315790120](https://www.pnas.org/doi/10.1073/pnas.2315790120)
[co-author]{.muted}
:::

## In preparation

::: {.lead-block}
**Wilson SR**, et al. The structure of developmental noise in a complete connectome.
[first author]{.status}
:::

::: {.lead-block}
**Wilson SR**, et al. Spatial transcriptomics of the larval mushroom body reveals
intrinsic pre-tuning of memory-circuit neurons. [first author]{.status}
:::

::: {.lead-block}
**Wilson SR**, et al. Towards the panconnectome. [first author]{.status}
:::
